svg.text: py-spy record --format flamegraph -o benchmark/results/html/svg/locust_2026-06-25_11-36-29_jobs-10000000_nodes-50000_cc-500_u-1000_r-200_t-10m_flamegraph.svg --subprocesses -- locust -f benchmark/locustfile.py --num-jobs 10000000 --num-nodes 50000 --candidates-count 500 --headless -u 1000 -r 200 -t 10m --log-level ERROR --csv benchmark/results/locust_2026-06-25_11-36-29_jobs-10000000_nodes-50000_cc-500_u-1000_r-200_t-10m --csv-full-history --html benchmark/results/html/locust_2026-06-25_11-36-29_jobs-10000000_nodes-50000_cc-500_u-1000_r-200_t-10m.html
